    "text": "func NewRepository(r db.Reader, w db.Writer, kms *kms.Kms, ctx context.Context, opt ...Option) (*Repository, error) {\nn1: \tconst op = \"session.NewRepository\"\nn2: \tif r == nil {\nn3: \t\treturn nil, errors.NewDeprecated(errors.InvalidParameter, op, \"nil reader\")\n\t}\nn4: \tif w == nil {\nn5: \t\treturn nil, errors.NewDeprecated(errors.InvalidParameter, op, \"nil writer\")\n\t}\nn6: \tif kms == nil {\nn7: \t\treturn nil, errors.NewDeprecated(errors.InvalidParameter, op, \"nil kms\")\n\t}\nn8: \topts := getOpts(opt...)\nn9: \tif opts.withLimit == 0 {\n\t\t// zero signals the boundary defaults should be used.\nn10: \t\topts.withLimit = db.DefaultLimit\n\t}\n\nn11: \tif opts.withPermissions != nil {\nn12: \t\tfor _, p := range opts.withPermissions.Permissions {\nn13: \t\t\tif p.Resource != resource.Session {\nn14: \t\t\t\treturn nil, errors.NewDeprecated(errors.InvalidParameter, op, \"permission for incorrect resource\")\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\nn15: \treturn \u0026Repository{\n\t\treader:       r,\n\t\twriter:       w,\n\t\tkms:          kms,\n\t\tdefaultLimit: opts.withLimit,\n\t\tpermissions:  opts.withPermissions,\n\t}, nil\n}\n"
